title: Super Ore
description: This mod creates super mines in Minecraft. When these mines are mined, the amount of ore extracted increases depending on the mining method used.
body:
# Super Ore
**explanation** : This mod generates super ores and random ores in Minecraft. Mines in this mod yield more ore than normal mines. However, the amount of ore you get depends on which pickaxe you use!
 ![fdg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d0f187341b63f50e3ce12ccb34da2e5e953235e.png)                                 -----------------------------------**probability :** The image on the right says ‘super diamond.’ 
 
>  If dug with an iron pickaxe, there is a 90% chance of getting 3 to 7 diamonds, a 10% chance of getting nothing, and a 30% chance of getting 1 level.

>  When dug with a diamond pickaxe, there is a 90% chance of obtaining 7 to 10 diamonds, a 10% chance of obtaining nothing, and a 40% chance of obtaining 1 level.  The same thing happens with netherite.

![fdg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8dddab029df1a11544a73ae31cd12b35727511a2_0.webp) 

### **Random Ore** provides random types and random numbers of minerals
- When ore is mined randomly, different combinations of minerals can be obtained from it.
- It can yield a minimum of 2 and a maximum of 5 minerals.
- There is no change when random ore is mined with different pickaxes.
- The reason for not having random ore deep in the ground is to increase the importance of the upper floors.


![fdg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/925f74082887b5bed3e3f1645e8b6bc4ae42d1d1.png) ![fdg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd0c193d43051029a487658a29c85b312d592a3d.png)
